subcodes.title: Words to Kinney, Beede, Thompson party, spoken on 1909-07-05
subcodes.first_line: There are two kinds of changes and alterations. One causes descent and one ascent. The one which causes descent is not good
subcodes.subjects: @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @differences in human capacity, @spiritual transformation, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
